entities.name: DEBUG
entities.context: A debugging tool that enables/disables specific debugging namespaces.

entities.name: DEBUG_HIDE_DATE
entities.context: A feature of the DEBUG tool to hide date from debug output.

entities.name: DEBUG_COLORS
entities.context: A feature of the DEBUG tool that determines whether to use colors in debug output.

entities.name: DEBUG_DEPTH
entities.context: A feature of the DEBUG tool that specifies object inspection depth.

entities.name: DEBUG_SHOW_HIDDEN
entities.context: A feature of the DEBUG tool that shows hidden properties on inspected objects.
